description:
# Open question

Federation specifics.

- `config/plugins/tracker/remote.yaml` schema: just `center: <url>`, or more (branch, auth hints, ttl)?
- Center discovery on `bl init`: `--center <url>` flag writes the file during init. After init, edit the file directly and `bl sync`.
- One-hop only: center's own remote.yaml is ignored. balls hard-stops at one shadow layer. Confirm this is the rule.
- How does tracker maintain center's checkout? Separate dir under `plugins/tracker/<center-url-encoded>/` (parallel to satellite's)? Yes — same directory structure, different remote.
- When does center's branch get refreshed? `bl sync` re-fetches BOTH satellite's and center's? Or center has its own TTL? Probably both on every sync.
- Read paths: when balls reads `config/balls.yaml`, it reads satellite's first, then layers center's underneath (per §4). When balls reads a `tasks/<id>.md`, does it look in center too? No — tasks are satellite-only, config is the only thing that federates.
title: Topic: federation (shadow config, center remote.yaml, one-hop)
